title: Fox News said to have settled with Tucker Carlson producer for $12 million
text: NEW YORK (AP) — Fox News will pay one of its former producers $12 million to settle her claims that she faced a discriminatory workplace and that the network coerced her into giving false or misleading testimony in Dominion Inc.'s defamation lawsuit, her lawyer said Friday.

title: Fox Settles Litigation With Former Producer for $12 Million
text: Former producer Abby Grossberg had alleged a toxic workplace at Fox News.

title: Fox News to pay $12 million to settle fired producer Abby Grossberg's lawsuit
text: Fox News agreed to pay $12 million to settle with ex-producer Abby Grossberg, who alleged network coerced her into giving misleading testimony on Dominion.

title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Fox Corp Stock - Fox (NASDAQ:FOXA), Fox (NASDAQ:FOX)
text: Fox Corp FOX FOXA on Monday announced a shift in its primetime Fox News lineup, following the departure of Tucker Carlson, the former top-rated cable TV host, from the network on April 21, who now hosts his own show on Elon Musk's Twitter.

title: Fox News names Jesse Watters as replacement for Tucker Carlson primetime slot
text: Fox News announced Jesse Watters will takeover its 8 p.m. ET primetime slot, once held by Tucker Carlson

title: CNN CEO Chris Licht is out amid backlash to Trump town hall and ‘bothsidesing' the news
text: NEW YORK (AP) — Chris Licht is out after a year as chief executive at CNN, following a series of missteps and plunging ratings.
